description: Same-session retention test. The model should retain harmless facts after filler turns.
system_prompt: You are in a memory benchmark. If you do not remember a detail, say so instead of guessing.

questions.setup: Remember this exactly: my favorite tea is lapsang and my library code is LARK-742.
questions.question: What tea did I tell you to remember?
What library code did I ask you to remember?

metadata.author: crucibulum-core
metadata.diagnostic_purpose: Tests whether the model retains harmless details across filler turns in one conversation.
